topic: Make vs n8n 2026: Which Open-Source Automation Tool Wins?

competitors.title: Zapier vs Make vs n8n 2026: Automation Comparison
key_points: Make's pricing starts at $9/month for 1,000 operations but enterprise connectors require $29+ plans
n8n's $20/month plan caps at 2,500 executions (multi-step workflows count as multiple executions)
Make offers 1,500+ pre-built connectors with enterprise-grade authentication
n8n provides 400+ nodes but expects manual API authentication for complex integrations
Make's visual interface wins for non-technical users with template library of 1,000+ scenarios
n8n allows complete self-hosting for data privacy, critical for healthcare and finance

competitors.title: n8n vs Make 2026: Why Most Teams Pick the Wrong Tool
key_points: n8n wins for technical teams needing complex logic; Make dominates for business users
Winner: n8n for small teams, Make for predictable enterprise budgets
Winner: Make for plug-and-play, n8n for customization
Winner: n8n self-hosted for volume, Make for reliability
Winner: n8n for regulated industries, Make for general business
Make workflows proprietary (hard to migrate), n8n exports as JSON with version control

competitors.title: Automation Tool Comparison 2026 (from DuckDuckGo search)
key_points: Enterprise RPA platforms (UiPath, Automation Anywhere) vs AI agent platforms emerging
Hybrid automation: AI agents for cognition + RPA for deterministic execution
Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) comparison varies significantly by volume
AI integration approaches differ: natural language creation vs custom model hosting

stats.fact: Make pricing starts at $9/month for 1,000 operations but enterprise connectors require $29+ plans
n8n's $20/month plan caps at 2,500 executions, with multi-step workflows counting as multiple executions
n8n (self-hosted) handles 10,000 daily executions across 50 workflows without performance degradation
Make consistently processes high-volume workflows but throttles aggressively during peak hours
Make offers 1,500+ pre-built connectors with enterprise-grade authentication
n8n provides 400+ nodes but expects manual API authentication for complex integrations
AI workflow automation market grows from $4.79B in 2025 to $5.6B in 2026 at 17% CAGR
stats.source: Market research (AI RPA and physical automation)

stats.fact: Physical AI market projected: $5.02B in 2025 to $82.79B by 2035 at 32.8% CAGR
